name: Railway Signalling Tampering
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of railway signalling systems (ERTMS/ETCS, interlocking, point machines) to cause train collisions, derailments, or service disruption
root_objective: Tamper with railway signalling to cause safety events or mass disruption

nodes.title: Tamper with Railway Signalling Systems
nodes.description: Compromise railway signalling infrastructure to cause incorrect signal aspects, point misalignment, or train control failures

nodes.title: Compromise ERTMS/ETCS Radio Block Centre
nodes.description: Attack the Radio Block Centre (RBC) that manages train movement authorities in ERTMS Level 2/3

nodes.title: Exploit GSM-R Network Vulnerabilities
nodes.description: Attack the GSM-R radio network carrying ETCS messages between trains and RBC using known 2G weaknesses

nodes.title: Inject False Movement Authority
nodes.description: Forge ETCS messages granting a train permission to enter an occupied or unsafe block section

nodes.title: Attack Interlocking System
nodes.description: Compromise the electronic interlocking that ensures safe routing of trains through junctions

nodes.title: Exploit Interlocking Maintenance Interface
nodes.description: Access the engineering/maintenance interface (often serial or Ethernet) of electronic interlocking systems

nodes.title: Modify Point Machine Control Logic
nodes.description: Alter the interlocking logic to allow conflicting routes or incorrect point positions

nodes.title: Compromise Train Control Centre
nodes.description: Attack the central traffic management/control centre used by dispatchers

nodes.title: Phish Control Centre Operator
nodes.description: Target traffic management centre operators with tailored phishing to gain workstation access

nodes.title: Display False Track Occupation
nodes.description: Manipulate the control centre display to show incorrect train positions, leading to unsafe dispatching decisions

nodes.title: Disrupt Passenger Information & Ticketing
nodes.description: Attack customer-facing railway systems for mass disruption without safety consequences

nodes.title: Ransomware on Ticketing Systems
nodes.description: Deploy ransomware on ticket vending and booking systems to disrupt revenue and passenger flow

nodes.title: Legacy Signalling Protocols (Unauthenticated)
nodes.description: Older signalling protocols lack authentication and integrity checks, relying on physical network isolation for security
